zh.lifeSummary: Dirk Wouter Jan van Boechem是Wouter Jan van Boechem和Mrs Wouter Jan van Boechem的兒子，於1290年出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特米德爾洛德。他與Elisabeth Arnoud van Moenle van HINTHAM結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1351年在荷蘭努-布拉班特丁特黑享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Dirk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish and Dutch form of Derek . Its use in the English-speaking world since the 1960s is largely due to the fame of the actor Dirk Bogarde ( 1921–99 , born Derek Niven van den Bogaerde ). He was of Dutch descent, although he was actually born in Scotland. The manly image of the name has been reinforced by its coincidence in form with Scottish dirk ‘dagger’ (from Gaelic durc).

nameMeanings.name: Wouter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: Dirk Wouter Jan van Boechem was born in 1290, in Middelrode, North Brabant, Netherlands as the son of Wouter Jan van Boechem and Mrs Wouter Jan van Boechem. He married Elisabeth Arnoud van Moenle van HINTHAM. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1351, in Dinther, North Brabant, Netherlands, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Dirk Wouter Jan van Boechem est né en 1290, à Middelrode, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, fils de Wouter Jan van Boechem et Mrs Wouter Jan van Boechem. Il a épousé Elisabeth Arnoud van Moenle van HINTHAM. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1351, à Dinther, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Dirk Wouter Jan van Boechem wurde 1290 in Middelrode, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande, als Sohn von Wouter Jan van Boechem und Mrs Wouter Jan van Boechem geboren. Er hat Elisabeth Arnoud van Moenle van HINTHAM geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1351 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Dinther, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Dirk Wouter Jan van Boechem è nato il nel 1290 nel Middelrode, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi come figlio di Wouter Jan van Boechem e Mrs Wouter Jan van Boechem. Lui sposato Elisabeth Arnoud van Moenle van HINTHAM. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1351, nel Dinther, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dirk Wouter Jan van Boechemは1290年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントミッドエルロドでWouter Jan van BoechemとMrs Wouter Jan van Boechemの息子として生まれた。Elisabeth Arnoud van Moenle van HINTHAMと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1351年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントディンスエルで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dirk Wouter Jan van Boechem(은)는 1290년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 미데로드에서 Wouter Jan van Boechem(와)과 Mrs Wouter Jan van Boechem의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Elisabeth Arnoud van Moenle van HINTHAM(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1351년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 딘터에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Elisabeth Arnoud van Moenle van HINTHAM. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1351, em Dinther, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Dirk Wouter Jan van Boechem родился в 1290 г. в местности мидделрод, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды. Его родителей звали Wouter Jan van Boechem и Mrs Wouter Jan van Boechem. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth Arnoud van Moenle van HINTHAM. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1351 г. в местности динтир, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды в возрасте 61 год.
